stages.concept:
# Unit 106: 4형식의 3형식 전환 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **4형식의 3형식 전환**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 4형식(S+V+IO+DO)은 3형식(S+V+DO+전치사+IO)으로 바꿀 수 있어요.

> He **gave** me a book. (4형식)
> = He **gave** a book **to** me. (3형식)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **to**를 쓰는 동사: give, send, show, tell, teach, lend, bring, write

> She **sent** him a letter. → She **sent** a letter **to** him.
> She **showed** me her photos. → She **showed** her photos **to** me.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **for**를 쓰는 동사: buy, make, cook, get, find

> Mom **bought** me a bag. → Mom **bought** a bag **for** me.
> She **made** him a cake. → She **made** a cake **for** him.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **of**를 쓰는 동사: ask

> He **asked** me a question. → He **asked** a question **of** me.

**Q. 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 편환한 것을 고르세요.**
"Mom bought me a new phone."
1. Mom bought a new phone to me.
2. Mom bought a new phone for me. ✅
3. Mom bought a new phone of me.

🧑‍🎓 학생: give/send/show → to, buy/make/cook → for, ask → of! 잘 기억할게요.

| 전치사 | 동사 |
|------|------|
| to | give, send, show, tell, teach, lend, bring, write |
| for | buy, make, cook, get, find |
| of | ask |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 106: 4형식의 3형식 전환 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 의미가 되도록 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She gave me a book.
= She gave a book (     ) me.
> **정답** to

---

**02.** He bought her a ring.
= He bought a ring (     ) her.
> **정답** for

---

**03.** Mom made us sandwiches.
= Mom made sandwiches (     ) us.
> **정답** for

---

**04.** I sent him a letter.
= I sent a letter (     ) him.
> **정답** to

---

**05.** She cooked me dinner.
= She cooked dinner (     ) me.
> **정답** for

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She gave a book for me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**07.** He bought a gift to her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to → for

---

**08.** I sent an email for him.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**09.** She made a cake to us.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to → for

---

**10.** He showed his report for the teacher.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**11.** 4형식을 3형식으로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
She gave me flowers.
> **정답** She gave flowers to me.

---

**12.** He bought me a bag.
> **정답** He bought a bag for me.

---

**13.** Mom cooked us soup.
> **정답** Mom cooked soup for us.

---

**14.** I sent her a message.
> **정답** I sent a message to her.

---

**15.** She made him a scarf.
> **정답** She made a scarf for him.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 나에게 사진을 보여 주었다.
She showed a photo to me
> **정답** She / showed / a / photo / to / me

---

**17.** 그는 그녀에게 선물을 사 주었다.
He bought a gift for her
> **정답** He / bought / a / gift / for / her

---

**18.** 나는 그에게 편지를 보냈다.
sent I a letter to him
> **정답** I / sent / a / letter / to / him

---

**19.** 엄마가 우리에게 케이크를 만들어 주셨다.
Mom made a cake for us
> **정답** Mom / made / a / cake / for / us

---

**20.** 선생님이 나에게 책을 주셨다.
The teacher gave a book to me
> **정답** The / teacher / gave / a / book / to / me
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 106: 4형식의 3형식 전환 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에
알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom taught her sister English.
→ Tom taught English _________ her sister.
for
of
to
with
> **정답** to

---

**02.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에
알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Mom made me fresh salad.
→ Mom made fresh salad ________ me.
by
for
to
of
> **정답** for

---

**03.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에
알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom asked her a favor.
→ Tom asked a favor _____________ her.
at
of
for
to
> **정답** of

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을
고르시오.
<보기> Amy told me her address.
Amy told her address to me.
Amy told her address of me.
Amy told her address for me.
Amy told her address about me.
> **정답** Amy told her address to me.

---

**05.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을
고르시오.
<보기> Tom bought us a delicious meal.
Tom bought a delicious meal to us.
Tom bought a delicious meal at us.
Tom bought a delicious meal of us.
Tom bought a delicious meal for us.
> **정답** Tom bought a delicious meal for us.

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을
고르시오.
<보기> The teacher asked us many questions.
The teacher asked many questions of us.
The teacher asked many questions by us.
The teacher asked many questions for us.
The teacher asked many questions to us.
> **정답** The teacher asked many questions of us.

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
While I was singing a song ________________ my
mom,
she cooked corn soup _______________ me.
for - to
to - to
of - of
to - for
> **정답** to - for

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom gave his old guitar _____________ me.
But, I didn't need it and sold it ______________ my
friends.
for - to
to - for
for - for
to - to
> **정답** to - to

---

**09.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식으로 잘못 바꾼 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
Amy sent them gift boxes.
→ Amy sent gift boxes to them.
She asked her a question.
→ She asked a question to her.
I wrote him a long text message.
→ I wrote a long text message for him.
Tom bought me a bunch of flowers.
→ Tom bought a bunch of flowers for me.
> **정답** I wrote him a long text message. → I wrote a long
text message for him., She asked her a question. →
She asked a question to her.

---

**10.** 다음 중 4형식 문장이 3형식으로 잘못 전환된 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
She teaches them math and English.
→ She teaches math and English to them.
The teacher gave the student a notebook.
→ The teacher gave a notebook for the
student.
My parents got me a new bike.
→ My parents got a new bike to me.
I showed him the way to the restroom.
→ I showed the way to the restroom to him.
> **정답** My parents got me a new bike. → My parents got a
new bike to me., The teacher gave the student a
notebook. → The teacher gave a notebook for the
student.

---

**11.** 다음 중 4형식 문장이 3형식으로 바르게 전환된 것을
고르시오.
Mom cook the children potato salad.
→ Mom cook potato salad for the children.
The lady next to me passed me salt.
→ The lady next to me passed salt for me.
Amy bought her son a new pair of jeans.
→ Amy bought a new pair of jeans to her
son.
Tom showed his friends his paintings.
→ Tom showed his paintings for his friends.
> **정답** Mom cook the children potato salad. → Mom cook
potato salad for the children.

---

**12.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사
for를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
pass give make get lend ask
buy show cook
> **정답** make get , buy , cook

---

**13.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사
of를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
make give send show cook tell
get ask sing
> **정답** ask

---

**14.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사
to를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
pass give make show cook tell
lend ask
> **정답** pass give , show , tell lend

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
그녀는 자신의 라디오를 내게 팔았다.
She sold her radio to me.
She sold her radio me .
She sold her radio of me.
She sold me her radio.
> **정답** She sold me her radio., She sold her radio to me.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
아빠는 엄마에게 다이아몬드 반지를 사주셨다.
Dad bought a diamond ring for mom.
Dad bought a diamond ring of mom.
Dad bought mom a diamond ring.
Dad bought a diamond ring to mom.
> **정답** Dad bought a diamond ring for mom., Dad bought
mom a diamond ring.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
Amy는 그에게 샌드위치를 만들어 주었다.
Amy made a sandwich him .
Amy made him a sandwich.
Amy made a sandwich for him.
Amy made a sandwich to him.
> **정답** Amy made a sandwich for him., Amy made him a
sandwich.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom brought his pet for
school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** for → to

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
It was my sister's birthday today. I wanted to buy a
special gift to her in the afternoon. But before
that, in the morning, I first sent a birthday
message to her and began baking a cake for
her. I also made some cookies of her. Later, I
went to a mall and got an expensive bag for
her.
> **정답** for, to, for, for

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
One day, Amy asked a personal question
for me. But I didn't want to answer. So, I told
"I don't know" to her. The next day, she gave
a sorry-letter to me. In return, I sent flowers
for her.
> **정답** of, to, to, to
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 106 4형식의 3형식 전환중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 고쳐 쓰시오.
My mom makes me each meal.
My mom makes  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  .
정답 each, meal, for, me

---

**02.** 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 고쳐 쓰시오.
I bought her a new computer on her birthday.
I bought  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  on
her birthday.
정답 a, new, computer, for, her

---

**03.** 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The kid asked me a question.
The kid asked  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  .
정답 a, question, of, me

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (3형식으로 쓸 것)
그녀는 엄마에게 선물을 사주었다. [buy, a gift]
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  her mom.
정답 bought, a, gift, for

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (4형식으로 쓸 것)
Brian은 공을 그녀에게 건넸다. [pass, a ball]
Brian  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 passed, her, a, ball

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (4형식으로 쓸 것)
나는 내 친구들에게 나의 강아지를 보여주었다. [show,
my puppy, my friends]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 showed, my, friends, my, puppy

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Tim]  [sent]  a  [love]  [letter]  [for]
[Emily.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 for → to

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Michelle]  [cooked]  [some]  [fancy]
[dishes]  [to]  [me.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• fancy dish 화려한 요리
정답 to → for

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (3형식으로 답할 것)
ask, favor
A: Where are you going, Mina?
B: To see Tom. I will  (     )  a  (     )   (     )  him.
정답 ask, favor, of

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (3형식으로 답할 것)
show, my talent
A: Are you ready for the contest?
B: Yes, of course. I am going to  (     )   (     )  
 everyone.
정답 show, my, talent, to

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 106: 4형식의 3형식 전환 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom taught his brother math. → Tom taught math _________ his brother. for of to with
> 정답: to

---

**02.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Dad made me fresh juice. → Dad made fresh juice ________ me. by for to of
> 정답: for

---

**03.** 다음 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Amy asked him a favor. → Amy asked a favor _____________ him. at of for to
> 정답: of

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom told me his phone number.
Tom told his phone number to me.
Tom told his phone number of me.
Tom told his phone number for me.
Tom told his phone number about me.
> 정답: Tom told his phone number to me.

---

**05.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르시오.
<보기> Amy bought us a nice gift.
Amy bought a nice gift to us.
Amy bought a nice gift at us.
Amy bought a nice gift of us.
Amy bought a nice gift for us.
> 정답: Amy bought a nice gift for us.

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장을 3형식으로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르시오.
<보기> The coach asked us several questions.
The coach asked several questions of us.
The coach asked several questions by us.
The coach asked several questions for us.
The coach asked several questions to us.
> 정답: The coach asked several questions of us.

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
While I was singing a song ________________ my dad, he cooked pasta _______________ me.
for - to to - to of - of to - for
> 정답: to - for

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom gave his old bicycle _____________ me.
But, I didn't need it and sold it ______________ my friend. for - to to - for for - for to - to
> 정답: to - to

---

**09.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식으로 잘못 바꾼 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Amy sent them gift cards. → Amy sent gift cards to them.
She asked her a question. → She asked a question to her.
I wrote him a long email. → I wrote a long email for him.
Tom bought me a box of chocolates. → Tom bought a box of chocolates for me.
> 정답: I wrote him a long email. → I wrote a long

---

**10.** 다음 중 4형식 문장이 3형식으로 잘못 전환된 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She teaches them art and music. → She teaches art and music to them.
The teacher gave the student a pen. → The teacher gave a pen for the student.
My parents got me a new laptop. → My parents got a new laptop for me. new laptop to me.
I showed him the way to the station. → I showed the way to the station to him.
> 정답: My parents got me a new laptop. → My parents got a new laptop for me.

---

**11.** 다음 중 4형식 문장이 3형식으로 바르게 전환된 것을 고르시오.
Mom cooked the children vegetable soup. → Mom cooked vegetable soup for the children.
The man next to me passed me the salt. → The man next to me passed the salt for me.
Amy bought her daughter a new pair of shoes. → Amy bought a new pair of shoes to her daughter.
Tom showed his friends his drawings. → Tom showed his drawings for his friends.
> 정답: Mom cooked the children vegetable soup. → Mom cooked

---

**12.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사 for를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
pass  give  make  get  lend  ask buy  show  cook
> 정답: make get , buy , cook

---

**13.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사 of를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
make  give  send  show  cook  tell get  ask  sing
> 정답: ask

---

**14.** 다음 중 4형식 문장을 3형식 문장으로 전환할 때, 전치사 to를 사용하는 것을 모두 고르시오.
pass  give  make  show  cook  tell lend  ask
> 정답: pass give , show , tell lend

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그는 자신의 카메라를 내게 팔았다.
He sold his camera to me.
He sold his camera me .
He sold his camera of me.
He sold me his camera.
> 정답: He sold me his camera., He sold his camera to me.

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
